<!-- GENERATED by scripts/generate-docs.ts from _pages/ + app/lib/abis — do not edit this file directly. -->

# Events index

Every event the protocol emits, grouped by contract. Signatures and field meanings live on the per-contract pages.

## PermanentCollection

**[`AcquisitionRecorded`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#acquisitionrecorded)** · Emitted once per `recordAcquisition`.

**[`CustodyUpdated`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#custodyupdated)** · Emitted on every custody transition: `InReturnAuction` at record time, then `ReturnedToMarket` or `Vaulted` at settle, and `InReturnAuction` again on a re-acquisition.

**[`Finalized`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#finalized)** · Emitted exactly once, when `setWiring` closes the `OneTimeSetup` gate.

**[`TraitsCollected`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#traitscollected)** · Emitted when a bit transitions to permanently collected: exactly one bit per `markCustody(punkId, Vaulted)`, the recorded target.

**[`TraitsPending`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#traitspending)** · Emitted alongside `AcquisitionRecorded` with the same single-bit `pendingBits` value, for indexers that key off per-bit pending state.

**[`WiringFinalized`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#wiringfinalized)** · Emitted once at `setWiring` time with the four wired addresses.

## Patron

**[`AllowedSellerAdded`](/docs/contracts/patron#allowedselleradded)** · Emitted when the admin adds a new seller to the `acceptListing` allowlist.

**[`AllowedSellerRemoved`](/docs/contracts/patron#allowedsellerremoved)** · Emitted when the admin removes an allowlisted seller.

**[`BidAccepted`](/docs/contracts/patron#bidaccepted)** · Emitted on every successful `acceptBid`.

**[`Finalized`](/docs/contracts/patron#finalized)** · Emitted exactly once, when `setWiring` closes the one-shot setup gate.

**[`ListingAccepted`](/docs/contracts/patron#listingaccepted)** · Emitted on every successful `acceptListing`.

**[`SurplusForwarded`](/docs/contracts/patron#surplusforwarded)** · Emitted when `skimSurplus` forwards forced/unaccounted ETH back to `LiveBidAdapter`.

**[`WiringFinalized`](/docs/contracts/patron#wiringfinalized)** · Emitted once at `setWiring` with the permanently-fixed `permanentCollection` and `returnAuctionModule` addresses.

## ReturnAuctionModule

**[`BidPlaced`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#bidplaced)** · Emitted on every accepted bid.

**[`LiveBidAdapterSet`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#livebidadapterset)** · Emitted exactly once, at the deployer's `setLiveBidAdapter` call.

**[`PunkVaulted`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#punkvaulted)** · Emitted on the unsold settle path.

**[`RefundQueued`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#refundqueued)** · Emitted when an outbid refund couldn't push to the previous bidder within the 30k gas budget.

**[`RefundWithdrawn`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#refundwithdrawn)** · Emitted when a bidder pulls a previously queued refund.

**[`ReturnAuctionCleared`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#returnauctioncleared)** · Emitted on the cleared settle path with the full proceeds split: `liveBidShare` (65% of cost, to `LiveBidAdapter`), `burnShare` (25% of cost, to `BuybackBurner`), `vaultBurnShare` (10% of cost plus the premium remainder, to `VaultBurnPool`)

**[`ReturnAuctionExtended`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#returnauctionextended)** · Emitted when an anti-snipe extension has moved `endsAt` further into the future.

**[`ReturnAuctionStarted`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#returnauctionstarted)** · Emitted once per `startSale`.

**[`VaultBurnPoolSet`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#vaultburnpoolset)** · Emitted exactly once, at the deployer's `setVaultBurnPool` call.

## PunkVault

**[`Approval`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#approval)** · Standard ERC721 single-token approval event for Proofs and the Title.

**[`ApprovalForAll`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#approvalforall)** · Standard ERC721 operator-approval event.

**[`ContractURIUpdated`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#contracturiupdated)** · ERC-7572 collection-metadata refresh hint.

**[`MetadataUpdate`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#metadataupdate)** · EIP-4906 per-token metadata refresh hint.

**[`OwnershipTransferred`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#ownershiptransferred)** · ERC-173 ownership transition.

**[`ProofMinted`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#proofminted)** · Emitted once per Proof, alongside the ERC721 `Transfer` from `address(0)`.

**[`PunkLocked`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#punklocked)** · Emitted exactly once per Punk that enters the vault.

**[`RendererRegistrySet`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#rendererregistryset)** · Emitted once, at the one-shot `setRendererRegistry` wiring.

**[`TitleAuctionSet`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#titleauctionset)** · Emitted once, at the one-shot `setTitleAuction` wiring.

**[`TitleMinted`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#titleminted)** · Emitted once, at Title mint time, with the title auction contract as `to`.

**[`Transfer`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#transfer)** · Standard ERC721 transfer event for Proofs and the Title, including the mint-time transfers from `address(0)`.

## LiveBidAdapter

**[`ActivationThresholdSynced`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#activationthresholdsynced)** · Emitted when the auto-sync inside `sweep()` processes a new `acceptBid` acquisition.

**[`BareTopUp`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#baretopup)** · Emitted on every direct ETH send into `receive()`: the hook's bid-leg skim, the locker's LP-fee forwards, and unattributed top-ups.

**[`Contribution`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#contribution)** · Emitted on every `contribute()` call.

**[`KeeperReward`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#keeperreward)** · Emitted when the `sweep()` caller's reward send succeeds.

**[`KeeperRewardFailed`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#keeperrewardfailed)** · Emitted when the reward send fails (the caller can't receive ETH).

**[`ParameterChanged`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#parameterchanged)** · Emitted by the three setters.

**[`PoolReplenished`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#poolreplenished)** · Emitted when the return-auction module routes a cleared auction's live-bid share into the buffer via `poolReplenish`.

**[`Swept`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#swept)** · Emitted on every non-zero forward, from `sweep()` and `streamForward()` alike.

**[`ThresholdCrossed`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#thresholdcrossed)** · Emitted exactly when a forward takes Patron's balance from below `activationThreshold` to at or above it.

## BuybackBurner

**[`BurnEthDeposited`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#burnethdeposited)** · Emitted on every ETH inflow through `receive()`.

**[`ExecutionRewardFailed`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#executionrewardfailed)** · Emitted when the caller-reward send fails.

**[`ExecutionRewardPaid`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#executionrewardpaid)** · Emitted when the caller reward is sent successfully.

**[`Finalized`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#finalized)** · Emitted exactly once, when `setup` completes and permanently closes the one-shot wiring gate.

**[`ParameterChanged`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#parameterchanged)** · Emitted by both setters.

**[`TokensBurned`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#tokensburned)** · Emitted on every successful step.

## VaultBurnPool

**[`Finalized`](/docs/contracts/vault-burn-pool#finalized)** · Emitted exactly once, by the successful `setup` call.

**[`SidePoolTaxBurned`](/docs/contracts/vault-burn-pool#sidepooltaxburned)** · Emitted on each `sweep` that burned a non-zero accrued $111 balance, with the amount burned.

**[`Swept`](/docs/contracts/vault-burn-pool#swept)** · Emitted on each `sweep` whose ETH forward to `BuybackBurner` succeeded, with the amount forwarded.

## ProtocolFeePhaseAdapter

**[`ClaimFailed`](/docs/contracts/protocol-fee-phase-adapter#claimfailed)** · Emitted when the escrow `claim` inside `sweep` reverts, with the escrow address.

**[`Forwarded`](/docs/contracts/protocol-fee-phase-adapter#forwarded)** · Emitted on every successful sweep, with the recipient (the controller, indexed) and the amount forwarded.

## ReferralPayout

**[`ReferralClaimed`](/docs/contracts/referral-payout#referralclaimed)** · Emitted on every successful `claim`/`claimFor` with the referrer (indexed) and the amount paid out.

**[`ReferralCredited`](/docs/contracts/referral-payout#referralcredited)** · Emitted on every hook `notify` credit with the referrer (indexed) and the amount added to their balance.

## PunkVaultTitleAuction

**[`Bid`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#bid)** · Emitted on every accepted bid.

**[`Extended`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#extended)** · Emitted when an anti-snipe extension moved `endsAt` further into the future, alongside the `Bid` event that triggered it.

**[`Kickoff`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#kickoff)** · Emitted when the auction clock (re)starts: once from `kickoff()`, and again from every no-bid `settle()` restart.

**[`ProceedsQueued`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#proceedsqueued)** · Emitted at a winning settle when 100% of the high bid is credited to `payoutRecipient` in the pull queue.

**[`ProceedsWithdrawn`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#proceedswithdrawn)** · Emitted when a queued proceeds credit was successfully pulled via `withdrawProceeds`.

**[`RefundQueued`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#refundqueued)** · Emitted during `bid()` when the 30,000-gas refund push to the outbid bidder failed and the amount was queued in `pendingRefund` instead.

**[`RefundWithdrawn`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#refundwithdrawn)** · Emitted when a queued refund was successfully pulled via `withdrawRefund()`.

**[`Settled`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#settled)** · Emitted on the winning settle path: the Title transferred to `winner` and `highBid` was credited to `payoutRecipient`.

**[`SettledNoBidder`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#settlednobidder)** · Emitted on the no-bidder settle path.

## PCSwapContext

**[`AuthorizedExtensionLocked`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#authorizedextensionlocked)** · Emitted exactly once, on `lockAuthorizedExtension`.

**[`AuthorizedExtensionSet`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#authorizedextensionset)** · Emitted on every `setAuthorizedExtension` with the new extension (indexed).

**[`OwnershipTransferred`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#ownershiptransferred)** · Emitted at construction (from `address(0)`) and on every `transferOwnership`.

**[`SwapEntered`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#swapentered)** · Emitted on every `enterSwap`.

**[`SwapExited`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#swapexited)** · Emitted on every `exitSwap`, closing the window opened by the matching `SwapEntered` in the same transaction.

## TokenAdminPoker

**[`ExtensionBound`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#extensionbound)** · Emitted on every `bindExtension` with the hook (indexed) and the extension (indexed).

**[`ExtensionLocked`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#extensionlocked)** · Emitted once, on `lockExtension`, with the hook (indexed).

**[`MaxReferralBpsSet`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#maxreferralbpsset)** · Emitted on every `setHookMaxReferralBps` with the hook (indexed) and the new cap.

**[`OwnershipTransferred`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#ownershiptransferred)** · Emitted at construction (from `address(0)`) and on every `transferOwnership`.

**[`TokenTaxBpsSet`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#tokentaxbpsset)** · Emitted on every `setTokenTaxBps` with the token (indexed) and the new rate in bps.

## ProtocolAdmin

**[`AdminBurned`](/docs/contracts/protocol-admin#adminburned)** · Emitted exactly once, on `transferAdmin(address(0))`.

**[`AdminTransferred`](/docs/contracts/protocol-admin#admintransferred)** · Emitted at construction (with `previousAdmin = address(0)`) and on every renewal or rotation.

## RendererRegistry

**[`Frozen`](/docs/contracts/renderer-registry#frozen)** · Emitted exactly once, when `freeze()` is called, with the block number.

**[`ImplementationUpdated`](/docs/contracts/renderer-registry#implementationupdated)** · Emitted at deployment (with `previous == address(0)`) and on every successful `setImplementation`, with the previous and next implementation addresses, both indexed.

## PunkSvgFragmentCache

**[`PunkCached`](/docs/contracts/punk-svg-fragment-cache#punkcached)** · Emitted exactly once per Punk, on its first successful `cachePunk`, with the Punk id (indexed), the SSTORE2 pointer address (indexed), and the fragment byte length.

## TraitIconCache

**[`TraitCached`](/docs/contracts/trait-icon-cache#traitcached)** · Emitted exactly once per trait, on its first successful `cacheTrait`, with the trait id (indexed), the SSTORE2 pointer address (indexed), and the fragment byte length.
